☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Whilst waiting, a group of sinners walked up to him, the leader — who was rather ugly to be perfectly honest — began flirting with Angel and offered to take him home. Angel brushed it off with a playful no, even though he wanted to cuss out that stupid sinner like no tomorrow. But then that fucker just kept pushing and pushing and… “Holy fuck, when will you shut UP?” He snaps out, looking at the sinners with a sneer. He stands up, and is actually about double the size of the loser who had been trying to bed him.

His top pair of arms cross over his chest, his bottom pair using the left hand to rest on his waist while his right jabbed a finger into the pests chest. “I’ve said ‘*no*’ about a million fuckin’ ways so just scram already,” he says without a hint of remorse. When the sinner fails to leave immediately, Angel scoffs and decides to take it one step further. “Did ya actually think you even had a chance with me, you ugly fuck? Honestly, you’d have to pay double my usual rate for me to even touch you.” He pulls his bottom right hand back, resting it on his hip. ❞
